nasb.text: ‘Who is left among you who saw this temple in its former glory? And how do you see it now? Does it not seem to you like nothing in comparison?

esv.text: ‘Who is left among you who saw this house in its former glory? How do you see it now? Is it not as nothing in your eyes?

cnv.text: ‘你們中間剩下的人，有誰見過這殿宇從前的榮耀呢？現在你們又看它怎樣？豈不是視如無物一樣嗎？’”

ccb.text: ‘你们当中有谁见过这殿昔日的荣耀呢？现在你们看这殿如何？看上去岂不是一文不值吗？
